prompt: I'm done with my changes on branch metrics-anomalies/add-zscore-filter. Submit a PR for the current branch.

assertions.text: Uses `gt submit` rather than `gh pr create` or `git push` to submit the PR
Includes `--draft` flag on the submit command
Includes `--no-edit` flag (or `--no-interactive`) to skip interactive prompts
Uses `gh pr edit` to set the PR title and body after submission
PR body includes the AI signing line (*🤖 Claude Code (claude-sonnet-4-6)*)
Mentions writing or references a handoff note (.notes/handoffs/)
